text: Being here, surrounded by glass, modern lines, and words about research and development, I feel a mild curiosity blooming alongside the ambient wonder of a museum or gallery. The blur of hurried movement contrasts with the silent contemplation inside. I sense the play between motion and stillness, the spectacle and the effort to understand. I am both participant and observer, blending into the process of discovery—a little unsettled, yet eager to ponder what lies within these walls.
